summary: Added tier token background color variables (green #dcfce7, amber #fef3c7, blue #dbeafe) to tokens.css and styled .tierMarker as a pill-shaped badge with tinted background, inline-block display, padding, and full border-radius. Each tier's marker now shows colored text on a matching light background, with text labels always visible alongside color. All 121 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
